# Ubiquiti airMAX / UISP Fixtures

Supported fixture families include NanoStation, NanoBeam, PowerBeam, LiteBeam, Rocket, airFiber, LTU, and UISP-managed radios.

NetSentinel does not claim UniFi wireless support from these fixtures. airMAX/UISP outdoor radios are distinct from UniFi APs.

The included samples are synthetic. RF metrics are accepted only when explicit fixture keys are present.
